message:
Add cass FilterResults + hooks config pure function tests

cass: 62.5% → 71.1% (+8.6pp)
- FilterResults: 7.1% → 97.6% (14 test cases covering scoring, age/relevance
  filtering, recency boost, project bonus, MaxItems, score clamping)
- countInjectedItems: 50% → 100% (structured format branch)
- formatAge: 77.8% → 100% (today/yesterday/N days ago)

hooks: 41.6% → 44.1% (+2.5pp)
- DefaultCommandHooksPath: 0% → 100% (XDG + fallback)
- DefaultCommandHooksDir: 0% → 100% (XDG + fallback)
- ExpandWorkDir: 80% → 100% (tilde expansion, env vars, combined vars)
- Duration MarshalText round-trip test
- CommandHooksConfig.Validate multi-hook error reporting

Bead: bd-25onn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
